_16 And Solomon had horses brought out of Egypt, and-linen yarn; the king’s merchants received the linen yaru at a price. “17 And they fetched "ps and brought forth out of Egypt a chariot for six hundred shekels: of silver, and a horse for a hundred and fifty; and so brought they out horses for all the kings of the Hittites, and for the kings of Syria, by their means.
